chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1744 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Sub-Inspector Mir Muhammad, NCCI Circle Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- DAG submits of Investigation officer NCCI Circle Sukkur, along with certain documents, same is taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will avail proper remedy, before proper forum. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
